title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Phi, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (pip install langchain-ollama) supplying LLM, embeddings and tool-calling wrappers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (formerly Ollama WebUI) comparable to ChatGPT interface; runs in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client SDK for Ollama with async, streaming and embedding helpers; Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with ActiveModel-style interfaces.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI client for Ollama with keyboard-driven chat and model management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-like inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration node to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that exposes chat, generate and embedding actions for no-code workflows.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) with docker-compose examples for server deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Electron desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming and embedding support; NuGet OllamaSharp.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Experimental Dagger module to run Ollama containers inside CI pipelines for testing LLM calls.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain in Docker.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into threads; configurable roles and model limits.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama functions to MCP clients like Claude Desktop.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfiles for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc. maintained by Ollama team.
